description: Dialogue for the Arcane Circle (Mage Guild) research board that handles repeatable magical research requests. Available to Journeyman rank and above.

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text: [The crystalline board glows with arcane symbols. Various research requests float as shimmering text, organizing themselves by difficulty and reward.]

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text: [Current Research Requests:]

choices.text: [Reagent Gathering] Collect rare herbs from Elder Moor - 125 gold
[Specimen Recovery] Retrieve magical creature parts for study - 175 gold
[Artifact Examination] Investigate magical disturbance site - 200 gold
[Rune Transcription] Copy ancient runes from Willow Dale - 150 gold
[Enchantment Testing] Field test experimental enchantment - 225 gold
[Planar Survey] Investigate ley line anomaly - 300 gold

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text:
[Reagent Gathering Request]

Location: Elder Moor
Target: Moonpetal flowers, Shadowroot, Glowcap mushrooms
Quantity: 5 of each type
Difficulty: Easy
Reward: 125 gold, 200 XP, +5 Circle reputation

Note: Moonpetals only bloom at night

[Accept this request?]

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text:
[Specimen Recovery Request]

Target: Giant spider venom glands, wolf hearts, bear claws
Location: Various wilderness areas
Quantity: 3 specimens of any type
Difficulty: Medium
Reward: 175 gold, 275 XP, +8 Circle reputation

Note: Fresh specimens preferred - within 24 hours of kill

[Accept this request?]

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text:
[Artifact Investigation Request]

Location: Reported magical disturbance near Crossroads
Objective: Survey site, document findings, retrieve any artifacts
Difficulty: Medium
Reward: 200 gold, 325 XP, +10 Circle reputation

Warning: Residual magical effects may be hazardous

[Accept this request?]

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text:
[Rune Transcription Request]

Location: Willow Dale ruins
Objective: Find and accurately transcribe ancient runes
Quantity: At least 10 distinct rune sequences
Difficulty: Easy
Reward: 150 gold, 250 XP, +7 Circle reputation

Note: Accuracy is critical - incomplete transcriptions rejected

[Accept this request?]

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text:
[Enchantment Field Test Request]

Task: Test experimental enchanted weapon against various enemies
Targets: Kill 5 enemies using only the test weapon
Difficulty: Medium-Hard
Reward: 225 gold, 375 XP, +12 Circle reputation
Requires: Adept rank

Bonus: Detailed combat notes earn extra reputation

[Accept this request?]

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text:
[Ley Line Survey Request]

Location: Anomaly detected between Elder Moor and Kazer-Dun
Objective: Investigate, measure magical flux, document phenomena
Difficulty: Hard
Reward: 300 gold, 500 XP, +15 Circle reputation
Requires: Adept rank

Warning: Planar instability possible - prepare accordingly

[Accept this request?]

choices.text: Accept the ley line survey request.

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text:
[Request Accepted]

Reagent collection kit provided. Travel to Elder Moor, collect the specified plants. Return samples to this board for analysis. Remember: Moonpetals only bloom at night.

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text:
[Request Accepted]

Specimen preservation jar provided. Hunt the specified creatures, harvest required parts. Fresh specimens (under 24 hours) provide better research data. Submit to this board.

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text:
[Request Accepted]

Survey equipment provided. Travel to the disturbance site near Crossroads. Document all magical phenomena, retrieve any artifacts. Exercise caution around residual energies.

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text:
[Request Accepted]

Transcription materials provided. Enter Willow Dale, locate ancient rune inscriptions. Copy at least 10 distinct sequences accurately. Incomplete or inaccurate work will be rejected.

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text:
[Request Accepted]

Experimental weapon provided. Test against exactly 5 enemies in actual combat. Note effectiveness, unusual behaviors, and any malfunctions. Return weapon and observations.

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text:
[Request Accepted]

Ley line detection equipment provided. Travel to the anomaly zone. Document all planar phenomena, measure magical flux levels. Warning: unstable magic may cause unexpected effects.

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text:
[Submit Research Materials]

[A crystalline receptacle glows, ready to receive and analyze your findings.]

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text:
[Research Verified - Payment Dispensed]

Your contributions advance the Circle's understanding. Gold and reputation have been credited to your account. The pursuit of knowledge continues.

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text: [The Arcane Circle research board provides ongoing work for qualified mages. Requests range from simple reagent gathering to complex planar surveys. Complete requests, submit findings, receive compensation. Higher ranks unlock more challenging and rewarding research.]

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text:
[Access Restricted - Journeyman Rank Required]

Research requests are available only to Journeyman mages and above. Complete the Circle's main examinations to advance in rank.

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text: [Your dedication to magical research is noted. Return when you wish to contribute further to the Circle's knowledge.]

nodes.speaker: Research Board
nodes.text: [The board dims as you step away. Knowledge awaits those who seek it.]
